reviewer_title: gatekeeper: extract standalone deterministic sorting functions for core row models ✅
summary: Extracted duplicated inline sorting logic into public functions `sort_lang_rows`, `sort_module_rows`, and `sort_file_rows` in `tokmd-model`. Refactored all property and integration tests to use these shared invariants.
proof_summary: Replaced inline closures across 8 test files. `cargo test -p tokmd-model` confirms sorting logic is identical and determinism is preserved.
